summary_zh: 今日AI进展：讨论重心集中在 AI Industry 与 Model Capability。Top10 关键人物仍在推动“模型能力产品化 + 发布反馈闭环”，全网高影响博主均值分约 0.583。
summary_en: Daily AI progress: discussion centers on AI Industry and Model Capability. Top voices keep focusing on productizing model capability and iterating via publish-feedback loops.

top10.name: Soumith Chintala
top10.daily_essence_zh: 今日精髓：围绕 Model Engineering 与 Robotics，强调“模型能力要进入可复用产品链路”，并持续优化发布-反馈-迭代闭环（影响力分 0.689）。
top10.daily_essence_en: Daily essence: around Model Engineering and Robotics, the key point is turning model capability into reusable product loops, then iterating with publish-feedback cycles (influence score 0.689).
